creator: bhdyke@gmail.com
text:
original Text regarding Unitedware
UnitedWare, LLC is a Cincinnati, Ohio based company that provides FreeBSD server setup and custom web and desktop applications. We perform IT audits and solutions to identify and manage the information needs of any business. To contact us visit our website or give us a call at (513) 563-0897. 

I have purchased Unitedware and they are now a part of the GSA contractor Crimson Gate Consulting Company. I am Brent H. Dyke and have Berkley Software history of 27 years. We look forward to building out the client based for FreeBSD, and as many FOSS operating systems as we can. CGCC and CGTI are 5 star GSA contractors working on the defense and infrastructure industry. Unitedware has become a part of that. 

Unitedware LLC. has had a few changes since this was sent to site originally. so we would like to see this in the vedor section of the FreeBSD website. 

"UnitedWare, LLC is a Columbus, Ohio based company that provides FreeBSD,NetBSD, and FOSS services to commercial and government clients. We perform IT audits, Security support, FOSS and Web design consultation, and partial or complete solutions to identify and manage the information needs of any business. To contact us visit our website or give us a call at (614)805-0897. "

Thank You for the assist. Donation will continue, and Thank You for building such a fantastic environment to work from. 


Brent H. Dyke (owner)
